description: Luxury page sentinel rubric. Every route in the site inventory is scored against these dimensions on every run. A page passes only when all blocking dimensions pass.

notFoundMarkers: >This page doesn't exist or has been moved<

dimensions.metric: HTTP status is 200 and body does not contain 404 markers
Page source uses the dark luxury shell (required markers present at shell level, banned light-shell markers absent)
Internal links on the page resolve to routes that exist in the route inventory

reporting.escalation: Any blocking dimension failure produces a Slack alert naming the exact route, dimension, and evidence
